tool.name: search-memory
tool.description:
Search the current agent session's working memory by keyword.
- query: the search term (required). The in-memory store performs case-insensitive substring matching on each item's content, type, and key. Semantic / vector search is a L4-3 successor scope (IMemoryAdapter).
Returns the matching items as a formatted listing. When the store is configured but no items match, returns a success result noting "No matching memory items" (this is a legitimate state, not an error). When no memory store is configured (no provider wired), returns an honest error result.

tool-result.output: Memory search (query='user'): 1 match(es). - key=user-pref type=note content: User prefers concise answers.
Memory search (query='nonexistent-term'): 0 match(es). No matching memory items.
